message:
refactor(web): unify CommandPalette with ActionRegistry for shortcut consistency

- Import ActionRegistryList as single source of truth for keyboard shortcuts
- Add formatRegistryShortcut() to display shortcuts from registry
- Add mapExperienceLevel() for type bridging between keyboard and palette types
- Add inferContextFromAction() to determine command availability context
- Generate overlay commands dynamically from ActionRegistry
- Ensures shortcut display matches actual keybindings throughout the app

This eliminates duplicate shortcut definitions and ensures consistency
between displayed shortcuts and actual keyboard bindings.

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
